_comment: Day-power × day-rhythm combos, set 2/3 (Steady Money · Windfall · Duty · Pressure) · translated from the Thai original (10 Jul 2026)

正財|建.title: Set up the money system
正財|建.text: Open the savings account, start the income-and-expense plan, take on work that pays reliably every month. Financial roots planted today grow strong. Money that starts with a system today will feed you for a long time.

正財|除.title: Plug the leaks
正財|除.text: The subscriptions you never use, the small expenses bleeding out every month — cancel them all today, down to the last one. Close out the little debts too. The leaks you stop today are a whole year of savings.

正財|滿.title: Money moving fast
正財|滿.text: Sales are brisk, goods flow in and out, customers come thicker than usual. But a big-money day is exactly when the numbers slip. Record every single transaction — real profit lives in the books, not in the feeling.

正財|平.title: Books in order
正財|平.text: Do the accounts, pay the bills, reconcile the totals, negotiate straight and fair. The numbers sit still today — no surprises. The boring routine money chores get done unusually fast today. Use it.

正財|定.title: Lock the price, lock the deal
正財|定.text: Sign the sale, agree the salary, fix the project price. Numbers settled today hold for the long run without flipping, and both sides walk away comfortable. A money deal tied down today is fair and tight.

正財|執.title: Line by line
正財|執.text: Unsent invoices, expense claims, totals that never got reconciled — sit down today and work through them line by line until they're done. Precision is pure profit today. One wrong digit found can pay for the whole day.

正財|破.title: No big buys, no new bets
正財|破.text: Big-ticket purchases and fresh investments — keep the wallet shut today, hard. Money that goes out today doesn't circle back. But a bad debt or a losing position that's dragged on too long? Today is the cleanest day to cut it loose.

正財|危.title: Don't move the big money
正財|危.text: Large transfers, portfolio moves, loan signings — postpone them all. Scams and hidden-interest contracts are running thick today. Whatever anyone hands you, read the fine print three times. Not sure means don't sign.

正財|成.title: The payment you've been waiting for
正財|成.text: The deal that's been ripening for months closes today, and the money you've chased finally lands in the account. Keep every receipt, thank your counterpart properly, and the next deal will come easier than this one.

正財|收.title: Money comes home
正財|收.text: Collect the debts, collect the rent, move money into savings — today is a true gathering day and money flows in easier than usual. One iron rule: nothing new goes out. Today the wallet is for receiving, not paying.

正財|開.title: Open a real income stream
正財|開.text: Open the storefront, start the side income with actual paying customers, raise your prices for good reason. The market is receptive today. New money started today isn't vapor — it's money you can count at every month-end.

正財|閉.title: Close the books, lock the safe
正財|閉.text: Close out the totals, close the month, move money somewhere safe. Today is for summing up, not spending. That online cart you left full? Leave it full. A wallet shut tight today is a heavier wallet next month.

偏財|建.title: Open the side deal
偏財|建.text: Side income, short-term deals, the unexpected client who just reached out — today is a good moment to begin. Floating money is looking for a place to land, but you have to reach out first. Don't wait for it to drift over on its own.

偏財|除.title: Flush out the dead weight
偏財|除.text: The deals that stopped paying, the stock gathering dust, the part of the portfolio dragging everything down — today you can clear them out with full conviction. Let the old stuff go and make room. New opportunities need somewhere to park.

偏財|滿.title: Luck from every direction
偏財|滿.text: Today's social rounds are a gold mine — one introduction leads to another, and another. Hand out every card you've got. But don't promise more than you can carry: ten opportunities doesn't mean grabbing all ten. Pick the right ones.

偏財|平.title: Opportunity whispers
偏財|平.text: The good deal today doesn't arrive with fanfare — it hides inside casual chats with people you know. Keep your ears open all day. Someone's throwaway remark today could turn into a whole quarter's income.

偏財|定.title: Turn the chance into a contract
偏財|定.text: The opportunity that's been circling for days — lock it into writing today, before the wind changes. Any terms that are ready, hammer them down now. Chances like this pass once and don't come around for a second look.

偏財|執.title: Dig through the fine print
偏財|執.text: The forgotten deal stuck in the pipeline, the clause nobody reads to the last page — dig into it today and you'll find treasure everyone else walked past. Today's best opportunities are hiding under a pile of paperwork.

偏財|破.title: Easy money is the bait
偏財|破.text: Lotteries, gambling, hot speculation, anything guaranteeing suspiciously high returns — hands off, every kind of it. But if you're stuck in some risky cycle, today is the most decisive day of the month to break free.

偏財|危.title: Too good to be true
偏財|危.text: The deal that looks too good, the stranger who's too generous — today belongs to the gold-plated trap. Before opening your wallet, check the story three layers deep. The real thing welcomes scrutiny. The fake will try to rush you.

偏財|成.title: Sharp eyes win the prize
偏財|成.text: A well-calculated risk pays off today, and the side deal closes beautifully. This profit came from your eye, not from luck. Write down how you thought this one through — that method will work again and again.

偏財|收.title: Take the profit, skip the greed
偏財|收.text: Whatever has hit its target — sell and pocket the gain today. Windfalls that come in, march them straight into the bank. Don't ride another round on greed. Profit you haven't collected isn't profit yet. It's just a number.

偏財|開.title: Try the untried market
偏財|開.text: A new sales channel, a customer group you've never touched — open it today and somebody bites. Strangers are today's source of luck. Step one pace outside your usual field: the new money is beyond the fence you know.

偏財|閉.title: All bets on pause
偏財|閉.text: Fast money moves in and out unusually quickly today — whatever comes in, lock it into an account that's hard to touch, immediately. Every form of gambling goes on pause. The hand that isn't rolling dice today is the hand ready to catch a real opportunity tomorrow.

正官|建.title: Start the official process
正官|建.text: File the government paperwork, open the case for the position, begin anything that runs on formal steps. The system is friendly today — do it by the book and things move unusually smoothly. Get the documents complete and walk right in.

正官|除.title: Clean up your record
正官|除.text: The pending matter with the authorities, the stuck license, the system error with your name attached — today you can push it through to done. A clean record is a long-term asset. Clear it now and breathe easy for a long while.

正官|滿.title: Full-dress occasion
正官|滿.text: Appointment ceremonies, promotion celebrations, grand openings with all the seniors present — the light lands on you today. Carry the role well: speak little, but make it count. Today's impression stays with the people upstairs for a long time.

正官|平.title: On time is the win
正官|平.text: Scheduled meetings, routine paperwork, the reports the system expects — smooth water today, no waves. The one thing to nail is the clock. The person who shows up on time today gets their name written down in the good column.

正官|定.title: Make it official
正官|定.text: Sign the major contract, hold the engagement, accept the post, make the appointment. Bonds tied today stand firm for the long haul. What you declare in front of many people today, heaven and earth take note of — and hold up.

正官|執.title: Polite but persistent
正官|執.text: The application that stalled, the answer that went silent — follow up today and it moves. Stay courteous and quote every reference number. Bureaucracy shifts for the person who follows up the right way, and today your way is right.

正官|破.title: Don't fight the system today
正官|破.text: Clashing with the boss, filing lawsuits, lodging appeals — skip all of it today. A collision with authority hurts only your side. But if there's a case you want to withdraw, a matter you want to drop, a tie you want to dissolve — today it ends cleanly.

正官|危.title: Your name is fragile today
正官|危.text: Don't sign for anyone, don't take responsibility for what you haven't fully seen, don't let anyone borrow your name. The reputation you've built over years is more exposed than usual today. Guard your signature like it's your last money.

正官|成.title: Approved
正官|成.text: The official matter you've long waited on gets approved today, and the position you hoped for carries your name on the notice. The people upstairs can see your work clearly. Remember to thank whoever pushed it through — the next rung is easier with someone steadying the ladder.

正官|收.title: Claim what's due
正官|收.text: Unclaimed benefits, entitlements now matured, files that need closing — today the errands complete in full. Everything your year of duty has earned turns into something real and touchable today.

正官|開.title: A new career door
正官|開.text: Apply for the new position, register the company properly, file for the promotion. The career gate stands wide open today — walk in with every document in hand. Today's official opportunities go only to the prepared.

正官|閉.title: File the folders, study the rules
正官|閉.text: Don't submit anything new today — the system isn't receiving visitors. Use the time to put your files in perfect order and truly master the rules around your next move. The one who knows the rulebook deepest wins the next round.

七殺|建.title: Open the hard mission
七殺|建.text: The fight you can't avoid, the hardest task on the list — open it today, because your nerve is unusually strong. But courage alone isn't enough: carry a backup plan. Fight with your head, not just your fists.

七殺|除.title: Cut out the old problem
七殺|除.text: The problem you've been running from, the wound left to fester for months — today the blade is sharp enough to cut it out. A short sting today beats another year of ache. Face it head-on and it truly ends.

七殺|滿.title: Pressure from all sides
七殺|滿.text: It all crashes in at once — colliding deadlines, people chasing you, fresh problems sprouting. Don't fight every front at the same time. Rank the gates by which must fall first, then take them one at a time. Today you win by sequence, not speed.

七殺|平.title: Drill during the ceasefire
七殺|平.text: The pressure eases for a moment — don't assume it's over. Use today to clear the heavy work at your own rhythm, rehearse for the next round, and sharpen your tools while the field is quiet. When the real fight comes, you'll be the readiest one on it.

七殺|定.title: Decide and don't look back
七殺|定.text: The big question that's hung in your chest for so long — today you call it. The information is all in; only the courage is left. Pick your road and walk it without turning around. From today on, hesitating costs more than choosing wrong.

七殺|執.title: Grip and don't let go
七殺|執.text: The hard problem everyone else backed away from — today you grind through it knot by knot with iron discipline. You don't need to be fast; you're just not allowed to stop. Stamina is today's secret weapon. The knot nobody could untie all month comes loose in the hands that refuse to let go.

七殺|破.title: One step back is the win
七殺|破.text: Fuses are dangerously short today — one wrong word can break things for good. Stepping back isn't losing; it's choosing your battlefield. But if something genuinely needs demolishing — the old and the expired — today you can swing at full strength.

七殺|危.title: Danger on top of danger
七殺|危.text: Physical risk, verbal risk, money risk — all three are off today. Heights, machinery, slick roads: avoid what you can. Let a neutral party handle the heated conversations. Staying somewhere safe today is strategy, not cowardice.

七殺|成.title: The long war ends in victory
七殺|成.text: The battle you've fought for so long closes today with the result you wanted. The boldness people once called reckless is now remembered as decisive. Take the honors in full — then breathe, all the way out.

七殺|收.title: Collect the spoils
七殺|收.text: That battle gave you more than a win. Pocket the lessons. Quietly bank the leverage, the connections, and the respect you earned along the way. All of it pays out in the next campaign.

七殺|開.title: Strike first
七殺|開.text: The competition hasn't found its footing; the market hasn't moved yet. Heaven favors the bold mover today — launch the offensive you've been planning. The first-mover advantage you seize today will feed you for months.

七殺|閉.title: Stand down and rest
七殺|閉.text: Stillness is today's edge. Pull out of the fights that aren't worth it, and stop carrying every war alone — delegate what can be delegated. Close the door and truly rest. The general who knows how to rest is the one who survives to the next war.
